name: Shepherd's Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss together the diced tomatoes, sliced cucumbers, diced onion, minced green onions, diced green bell pepper, and minced hot green chili.
2. Add the chopped parsley and mix well.
3. Drizzle with oil and lemon dressing, then season with salt and vinegar to taste. Mix until all ingredients are evenly coated.
